**************Biggest Grammy Award surprises of all time on AOL Music.     
(http://music.aol.com/grammys/pictures/never-won-a-grammy?NCID=aolcmp003000000025
48)


From: "George Reenstra" <g.reenstra@yourjet.com>
Subject: S/N 667
Date: Thu, 24 Jan 2008 21:08:43 GMT
To: dkiesq@aol.com
Cc: "George Reenstra" <g.reenstra@yourjet.com>

Thought I would send you a short note concerning 667.  I understand it
is still available.  As in the past, I am certainly interested in
selling the aircraft for Jeffrey.  I need to know what his bottom line
is because I need to make some money also.  The other thing is I would
only do it on an exclusive representation.  To give you some idea of
what we have either under contract or have closed since December:
 
S/N 353 - a B model
S/N 514 - a C+ model
S/N 512 - a C+ model
S/N 499 - a C+ model
S/N 694 - a C++ model
S/N 715 - a C++ model. Delivers green in April.
S/N 722 - a C++ model.  Delivers green in June.
 
Bottom line is we'll get you results.  We are currently the largest
reseller of the Sikorsky's and as a result, the customers come to us.
We know the product and we know the angles.  Ask if Jeffrey is
interested.  Would like to do it for him.  Where are you keeping the
667?
 
Business aside, how's everything?  Hope you and your family are well.
Regards.
 
 
 
George Reenstra
Aircraft Services Group, Inc.
545 Island Road, Suite 2B
Ramsey, NJ  07446
Phone:  201-995-9570
Fax:      201-995-9504
E-Mail:  george@yourjet.com
